description: Classic DLL injection via CreateRemoteThread. XOR-encrypted DLL path (8-byte key) decrypts to C:\Windows\Temp\payload.dll. Resolves WinAPI functions manually via PE export table parsing to avoid IAT entries. Anti-debugging via direct PEB.BeingDebugged check. Enumerates processes via CreateToolhelp32Snapshot, opens explorer.exe, allocates memory via VirtualAllocEx, writes DLL path, and creates remote thread pointing to LoadLibraryA. Synthetic/safe — targets explorer.exe with a non-existent payload DLL.
